---
name: Data Issue
about: Report incorrect income data, outdated statistics, or data source problems
title: "[DATA] "
labels: data
assignees: Varnasr
---

## Type of Data Issue

- [ ] Incorrect income percentile calculation
- [ ] Outdated statistics or figures
- [ ] Missing data for a specific income range or region
- [ ] Data source link broken or unavailable
- [ ] Discrepancy with official source
- [ ] Other

## Describe the Issue

A clear description of the data problem you encountered.

## Current Data Shown

What value or statistic does the tool currently display?

## Expected / Correct Data

What should the correct value be? Please include your reference.

## Data Source Reference

Please provide the authoritative source for the correct data:
- **Source name**: (e.g., World Inequality Lab, PLFS 2023-24, Economic Survey 2024-25)
- **URL**:
- **Page / Table number**: (if applicable)
- **Date of publication**:

## Income Range / Region Affected

- **Income range**: (e.g., Rs. 25,000 - Rs. 50,000/month)
- **Region**: (e.g., Urban, Rural, All India)
- **State**: (if applicable)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or calculations that support this data issue.
